question_text_markdown: Which of the following is **NOT** a way to navigate from one link to the next using a screen reader?
rationale: Requires understanding of how screen readers behave and how users navigate content using them.

question_text_markdown: Which of the following is a way to list all links using a screen reader?
rationale: Requires understanding of how screen readers behave and how users navigate content using them.

question_text_markdown: Which of the following is a way to navigate to headings of a certain level using a screen reader?
rationale: Requires understanding of how screen readers behave and how users navigate content using them.

question_text_markdown: Which of the following is **NOT** a way to navigate from one heading to the next using a screen reader?
rationale: Requires understanding of how screen readers behave and how users navigate content using them.

question_text_markdown: Which of the following is **NOT** a way to navigate from one landmark to the next using a screen reader?
rationale: Requires understanding of how screen readers behave and how users navigate content using them.
